ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "profile_link" TEXT /* Link to the faculty member's profile */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Faculty member leading the research */,
  "research_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "research_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Faculty member supervising the student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Faculty member receiving the citation */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication where the citation was made */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each faculty member
Full name of the faculty member
Email address of the faculty member
Phone number of the faculty member
Date the faculty member was hired
Brief biography of the faculty member
Research interests of the faculty member
Link to the faculty member's profile
Department the faculty member belongs to
Unique identifier for each research project
Brief description of the research project
Start date of the research project
End date of the research project
Name of the publication where the citation was made
